name: Evertrust Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank established in 1995, now a U.S. subsidiary of Taiwan's O-Bank, operating 8 branches across Northern and Southern California with deposit and commercial lending services.
description_long:
EverTrust Bank was founded in 1995 by Chinese American bankers and entrepreneurs in California. In 2007, the institution became the U.S. subsidiary of Industrial Bank of Taiwan (O-Bank), establishing its headquarters in the City of Industry, California. This heritage reflects a focus on serving both the general California market and Asian American communities, with multilingual website support in English, Simplified Chinese, and Traditional Chinese.

EverTrust Bank offers a range of banking products including savings accounts, online account opening, mobile banking, online banking, and commercial lending services. Their Smart Saver Savings Account provides tiered APY rates: 3.60% APY for balances of $5,000 or more, and 0.50% APY for balances below $5,000. They offer a limited-time $300 cash bonus for customers who set up direct deposit. The bank also provides payment integration with Apple Pay and Google Pay, as well as access to Zelle for money transfers. Additionally, EverTrust operates an in-house insurance agency offering auto, home, business, and renters insurance.

Key distinguishing factors include their strong FDIC insurance backing, multilingual customer service, and eight physical branch locations concentrated in California's major metropolitan areas—2 in Silicon Valley and 6 in Greater Los Angeles. The bank emphasizes security awareness with extensive fraud prevention resources, cybersecurity tips, elder fraud prevention materials, and scam alerts from the California Department of Financial Protection and Innovation (DFPI). Their integration with O-Bank provides international banking connections.

EverTrust Bank is best suited for California residents seeking community banking with multilingual support and regional branch access. However, as a regional bank with only 8 locations, customers outside Northern and Southern California have no physical branch access. The savings rates, while competitive at 3.60%, may fluctuate and are subject to balance minimums. Prospective customers should note the bank's specific geographic limitation and verify current rates and terms before opening accounts. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Smart Saver Savings Account with tiered APY rates
Online account opening for personal savings and TCD accounts
Mobile banking and mobile app access
Apple Pay and Google Pay integration
ETB Insurance Agency (auto, home, business, renters insurance)
Customer service via phone (866-985-0616 or 626-656-1109) Mon-Fri 9am-5:30pm PT
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of the U.S. Government
Competitive 3.60% APY on Smart Saver Savings Account for balances $5,000+
Multilingual support in English, Simplified Chinese, and Traditional Chinese
8 physical branch locations in Silicon Valley and Greater Los Angeles for in-person service
$300 cash bonus for direct deposit setup (limited-time offer)
Mobile banking and online account opening available for convenience
In-house ETB Insurance Agency offering auto, home, business, and renters insurance
cons: Limited geographic footprint—only 8 branches in California; no branches outside Northern and Southern California regions
Lower APY of 0.50% for savings balances below $5,000 creates tiered system that disadvantages smaller account holders
Limited product information on website; no visible details on commercial lending rates, terms, credit card products, or other services mentioned in About Us section
Regional bank subsidiary status may limit product diversity compared to national or larger financial institutions
No mention of checking accounts, CDs, or investment products on the homepage, limiting product transparency

contact.address: 13191 Crossroads Pkwy N, City Of Industry, CA 91746

best_for: California residents in Silicon Valley or Greater Los Angeles seeking multilingual banking support
Chinese American and Asian American communities preferring culturally-aligned banking with multilingual service
Customers with $5,000+ in savings seeking competitive rates through FDIC-insured accounts
Small businesses in California seeking community banking relationships and commercial lending services
diagnosis: EverTrust Bank is best for California residents, particularly in Silicon Valley or Greater Los Angeles, who value multilingual service and community banking relationships with FDIC insurance. The primary caveat is geographic limitation: with only 8 branches concentrated in two California regions, the bank is unsuitable for customers outside these areas or those requiring national branch access.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
